allow: Bash(do python3 -c " import json, os, sys data = json.load\(open\(''$nft''\)\) files = data.get\(''files'', []\) nft_dir = os.path.dirname\(''$nft''\) total = sum\(os.path.getsize\(os.path.normpath\(os.path.join\(nft_dir, f\)\)\) for f in files if os.path.exists\(os.path.normpath\(os.path.join\(nft_dir, f\)\)\)\) print\(f'' {""$nft"":60s} {len\(files\):3d} files {total/1024/1024:.1f} MB''\) ")
